title: Death Note
description: Adds the Death Note from the manga/anime "Death Note"
body:
This mod adds the Death Note from the manga/anime "Death Note" this mod adds a few things

-The Death Note

-A Fake Death Note

-And a piece of paper from the Death Note

The Death Note can be obtained by it falling from the sky, this has a very low chance of happening though.

The Fake Death Note can be obtained through crafting it.

![Fake Death Note Crafting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Oz6Fk7Hb/images/dd855f34da870d77ff119d63523c5ecfbc3c54ac.png)

A Death Note paper can be obtained by ripping it out of the Death Note
